name: Databricks - Code to cloud repo linking

statements.__comment: Link a Databricks Git-backed repo to the GitHub repository that hosts its source, normalising the trailing .git so the workspace repo and the ingested GitHubRepository match. Runs in the analysis phase so both modules have already synced.
statements.query: MATCH (r:DatabricksRepo) WHERE r.url IS NOT NULL AND toLower(coalesce(r.provider, '')) CONTAINS 'github' WITH r, replace(r.url, '.git', '') AS rurl MATCH (gh:GitHubRepository) WHERE replace(gh.url, '.git', '') = rurl MERGE (r)-[rel:SOURCED_FROM]->(gh) ON CREATE SET rel.firstseen = timestamp() SET rel.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Remove stale SOURCED_FROM edges from a previous run.
